mapper.insert:
insert into db_camera ( camera_id, camera_name, latitude, longitude, status, create_at, updated_at ) values
( #{record.cameraId}, #{record.cameraName}, #{record.latitude}, #{record.longitude}, #{record.status}, #{record.createdAt}, #{record.updatedAt} )
on duplicate key update camera_name = values(camera_name), latitude = values(latitude), longitude = values(longitude), status = values(status), updated_at = values(updated_at)
